parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: $env.CONTACT_FROM_EMAIL, to: [$json.attendeeEmail], reply_to: $env.CONTACT_NOTIFY_TO, subject: 'Your call is booked: ' + $json.title, html: '

Hi ' + $json.attendeeName + ',

Your call is confirmed for ' + $json.when + ' (' + $json.timeZone + ').

Join the meeting

Or open the link directly:
' + $json.meetingLink + '

See you then!
— ' + $json.organizerName + '

' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ from: $env.CONTACT_FROM_EMAIL, to: [$env.CONTACT_NOTIFY_TO], subject: 'New booking: ' + $json.title, html: '

' + $json.attendeeName + ' (' + $json.attendeeEmail + ') booked a call.

When: ' + $json.when + ' (' + $json.timeZone + ')

Link: ' + $json.meetingLink + '

' }) }}
